The Vision in a ravine was [[Kamidere|Immanuelle's]] near death experience in the [[Alpha Pilgrimage]].

It disabled her and is seen as a predecessor to the [[2021 revelation]]


{{Alpha Pilgrimage}}

[[Category:Pilgrimages]]
[[Category:Revelations]]
[[Category:Stubs]]
[[Category:Alpha Pilgrimage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
